data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Inspector re-verification and sign-off', but the evidence does not provide any concrete API reads or checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for inspector verification and sign-off, but there is no evidence of an API endpoint or functionality that supports this requirement. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence provided to satisfy the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoint or functionality for inspector re-verification and sign-off.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the inspector re-verification and sign-off requirement.
